title: Mediterranean Lamb Tagine
description: A flavorful and aromatic lamb tagine infused with the essence of Mediterranean spices, perfect for a special occasion.
instructions: Heat the oil in a large clay pot or Dutch oven over medium heat.
Brown the lamb on all sides, then set aside.
Add the onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Add the cinnamon, cumin, coriander, salt, and pepper, and cook for 1 minute.
Add the browned lamb and any accumulated juices, and bring to a simmer.
Transfer the pot to the oven and braise the lamb for 2 1/2 hours, or until tender.
Remove the pot from the oven and stir in the preserved lemon, if using.
Serve the lamb hot, garnished with fresh herbs, if desired.
